title: Ability to widen the Table of Contents column
excerpt: It seems such a simple thing, but especially when using the Narrow Style which leaves plenty of white space. Please give us the ability to widen the Table of Contents column so that we can see the full headings. Thank yo…

posts.author: myrrhw (Myrrh Winston)
posts.cookedHtml: It seems such a simple thing, but especially when using the Narrow Style which leaves plenty of white space. Please give us the ability to widen the Table of Contents column so that we can see the full headings. Thank you!
